summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 7 new features in Edu Advisor. All 26 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI features verified via Playwright. Fixed backend bug in CSV bulk upload endpoint.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes.py (fixed CSV bulk upload endpoint - added Body(...) for proper request parsing)
seed_data_creation: Test reports with TEST_ prefix created during testing, cleanup performed at end of test suite
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested features are fully implemented and tested. Backend CSV upload endpoint was fixed to properly parse array body parameter.

Feature 1 - Duplicate Report Handling.description: When submitting report with same phone number, API returns duplicate detection with existing report info. Frontend shows confirmation modal with 'Yes, Update' and 'No, Keep Original' options.

Feature 2 - Mandatory Fields Enforcement.description: Form fields marked with red asterisks (*): Student Name, Contact Number, Institution Name, Competitive Exam Preference, Career Interest, Interest Scope. Frontend validates before submission.

Feature 3 - Quick Log Call Contact Requi.description: Quick Log Call modal shows 'Contact number is mandatory' warning. Failed/Attempted buttons are disabled until contact number is entered. Backend validates and returns 400 if contact missing.

Feature 4 - Admin Detailed Call Stats Vi.description: Admin Dashboard > Call Stats tab shows table with columns: Consultant, Total Calls, Successful, Failed, Attempted, Success Rate, Actions(Delete). Stats badges are clickable to show detailed call list modal.

Feature 5 - Consultant View Own Call Sta.description: Consultant Dashboard > My Calls tab shows clickable stat cards. Clicking on any stat (Total/Successful/Failed/Attempted) opens modal with detailed call list showing Date/Time, Student, Contact, Type, Remarks.

Feature 6 - Next Calling Reminder.description: Report form has 'Next Calling Reminder' field with calendar date picker. Reminders tab shows categorized view: Overdue, Today's, Upcoming reminders. Mark as complete functionality works.

Feature 7 - CSV Bulk Report Upload.description: Consultant Dashboard shows 'Bulk Report Upload' section with Download Sample CSV and Upload CSV buttons. API validates required fields and interest_scope values. Auto-logs successful calls for each uploaded report.
Feature 7 - CSV Bulk Report Upload.bug_fixed: Backend endpoint /api/consultant/bulk-reports was not parsing body correctly. Added Body(...) annotation to fix.

consultant_dashboard.call_stats_bar: PASS - Shows Total Calls, Successful, Failed, Attempted with counts
consultant_dashboard.quick_log_call_modal: PASS - Contact number marked mandatory, buttons disabled without it
consultant_dashboard.report_form_mandatory_fields: PASS - All 6 mandatory fields marked with red asterisks
consultant_dashboard.next_calling_reminder: PASS - Calendar date picker opens, can select future dates
consultant_dashboard.my_calls_tab: PASS - Clickable stats show detailed call list modal
consultant_dashboard.reminders_tab: PASS - Shows categorized reminders with action buttons
consultant_dashboard.csv_upload_section: PASS - Download Sample CSV and Upload CSV buttons visible

admin_dashboard.call_stats_tab: PASS - Shows per-consultant stats table with clickable badges
admin_dashboard.reminders_tab: PASS - Shows all consultant reminders categorized by status
